blended.narrative: Mt. Hood Meadows is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 8" of heavy snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 13.2" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is building — up 9" over the past week. Current depth: 47".
